senses.gloss: prodigal, extravagant, spendthrift, wasteful (profuse in expenditure)

examples.text: وَكُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ وَلَا تُسْرِفُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
examples.english: Eat and drink, but do not waste. Surely the Lord does not like the wasteful.

examples.text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَنْ هُوَ مُسْرِفٌۭ كَذَّابٌۭ
examples.english: Surely Allah does not guide whoever is a transgressor, a total liar.

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of أَسْرَفَ (ʔasrafa, “to be excessive”).
